OPK Multi-Panel Folding Wooden Door Hardware System

Estimated Schedule
Deposit & Order Confirmation Order placed upon receipt of 50% deposit
Production & FOB Ready 30–40 days after deposit received
Shipping & Customs Clearance 14–21 days sea freight + Thai customs clearance
Delivery to Site 1–3 days last-mile after customs clearance
Total Lead Time (Estimate) 45–64 days from deposit
Scope of Supply
  • Scope covers supply and delivery of the folding door hardware system only, as specified above. Wooden door panels and installation are not included.
  • Goods will be delivered to the project site address confirmed at time of order. Unloading assistance and safe storage at site are the customer's responsibility.
  • Excluding wooden door panels, glass, paint, stain, or any finishing materials.
  • Excluding on-site installation, carpentry, or structural preparation works.
  • Excluding any works or materials not mentioned in this document.
Remarks
  • Product images and specifications are for reference only. Minor variations in finish tone are inherent to the anodising process — confirm color selection at time of order.
  • Areda Atelier reserves the right to determine final specification and completion standard.
  • A sales contract based on our standard terms must be signed upon acceptance of this quotation.
  • Deposit payment is non-refundable once production has been confirmed with the manufacturer.
  • Unit rates are based on the USD/THB exchange rate of ฿33.52 per USD (BOT reference rate ฿32.54 + 3% buffer, as of 2 April 2026) and are valid for 15 days from the document date. Rates are subject to adjustment if the prevailing BOT rate at time of order deviates by more than 3% from this reference rate.
  • The client may not withhold any payment; all payments must follow the agreed schedule below.
  • Any product defects or claims must be reported within 7 days of delivery and may not be used as grounds to withhold payment.
  • Estimated schedule is subject to unforeseen delays in shipping, customs, or port congestion.
  • Hardware compatibility: customer is responsible for ensuring the wooden door panels meet the system's weight and dimensional requirements (≥40 kg/panel, 2–6 panels).
Payment Terms
Payment 1 — 50% Deposit upon signing contract / order confirmation (required to commence production) ฿10,432.50
Payment 2 — 40% Before goods depart origin factory / prior to international shipment ฿8,346.00
Payment 3 — 10% Upon delivery to site and goods receipt confirmation ฿2,086.50
